mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.username AS username, c.court_name AS courtName FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN courts c ON r.court_id = c.id WHERE r.court_id = #{courtId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT r.*, u.username AS username, c.court_name AS courtName FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN courts c ON r.court_id = c.id WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId}

SELECT r.*, u.username AS username, c.court_name AS courtName FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN courts c ON r.court_id = c.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (reservation_id, user_id, court_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{reservationId}, #{userId}, #{courtId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.username AS username, c.court_name AS courtName FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN courts c ON r.court_id = c.id ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
